extortion.description: [AI generated] "BRINKS.CO.NZ" is a New Zealand based chicken breeding company. The business, founded in 1932, boasts a wide range of world-class chickens and layers from their own breeding farms. They focus on enhancing the quality and productivity of their poultry through natural breeding processes. They also emphasize on animal welfare, sustainable farming practices and are actively working towards providing healthier poultry products.
